arts.sum: Germany host Bosnia and Herzegovina in the penultimate round of the Uefa Nations League group stage on Saturday evening. Julian Nagelsmann’s side are already guaranteed a top two finish in League A Group 3 and progression to the quarter-finals, allowing the manager room to experiment with his starting XI. arts.ttl: Leroy Sane to Man Utd? The state of play revealed
arts.sum: Man Utd are monitoring his situation at the Allianz Arena as they consider a move for the 28-year-old, however Arsenal and Newcastle United are also keeping tabs on Sane ahead of the 2025 summer transfer window. Manchester United reportedly remain interested in signing Leroy Sane, although they will face significant competition in the race for his signature.
